profiles.name: tolaria-setup
profiles.description: Tolaria's agent-native engineering setup: direct-to-main TDD contract, CodeScene ratchet gates + MCP wiring, ADR system with /create-adr, two-tier husky gates (lint pre-commit; build/coverage/smoke/CodeScene pre-push), Codacy/Semgrep, optional Chunk sidecar lanes and Todoist task-loop commands. Extracted from github.com/refactoringhq/tolaria.
profiles.author: Luca Mastrostefano

profiles.name: andrej-karpathy-skills-setup
profiles.description: Karpathy-inspired LLM coding guidelines extracted from forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills: one behavioral contract (CLAUDE.md) plus the same guidelines as a Claude Code skill and a Cursor project rule
profiles.author: Luca Mastrostefano

profiles.name: agent-native-baseline
profiles.description: The default profile — the complete agent-native setup the engine scaffolds when you don't pick one: AGENTS.md contract, docs + RFCs, quality gates, security scanning, CI, and a .claude library. Fork it to build your own.
profiles.author: Luca Mastrostefano
